followUpTasks.title: [church-connect] vNext: Current State Review
followUpTasks.body:
Run the Current State Review phase for ChurchConnect v1 -> v1.1.

## vNext Packet
- App: ChurchConnect
- Slug: church-connect
- Current version: v1
- Target version: v1.1
- Charter: source-of-truth/charters/church-connect.md
- Request type: fix
- Summary: Reconcile the split follow-up tables (connection_inbox vs connection_cards) into one canonical table and extend the existing visitor-capture -> admin follow-up -> persistent followed-up-state path. Do not build parallel surfaces.
- Feedback source: RUN-001 ChurchConnect Visitor Capture loop (prior-work check, extend_existing)
- Barrier removed: Churches lose track of visitor follow-up because admin and data surfaces read different tables, so follow-up state is unreliable.
- Need addressed: Church teams need one reliable place where a visitor's follow-up status persists and is visible to the right people.
- Movement toward life: A visitor who reaches out is reliably followed up with, moving from isolation toward belonging.
- Transformation outcome: Churches become more capable of not losing the people who ask for connection.
- Tool classification: unclassified
- Known issues: table_split: admin and data surfaces read connection_inbox vs connection_cards; persistent follow-up state is not reliable
- Non-goals: do not rebuild visitor capture (extend VisitorRegistration.tsx); do not build NewVisitorCaptureForm or VisitorAdminDashboard duplicates; do not create a visitor_submissions table; no unrelated CRM features

## Required Source Of Truth To Load
- source-of-truth/00-why-we-build.md
- source-of-truth/01-ecosystem-philosophy.md
- source-of-truth/02-global-principles.md
- source-of-truth/03-life-produces-life.md
- source-of-truth/04-app-purpose-rules.md
- source-of-truth/05-ecosystem-design-gates.md
- source-of-truth/build-completion-orchestrator.md
- source-of-truth/app-url-lifecycle-standard.md
- source-of-truth/cost-governance-model-routing.md
- source-of-truth/charters/church-connect.md
- source-of-truth/app-improvement-vnext-packet.md
- agents/manifest.yaml
- agents/context/output-contracts.md

## Required Loaded Context
- Registry: Super Admin registry
- Monitoring: monitoring data or known issue list
- Release history: release history

## Provider/Cost Delta
- New paid resources expected: false
- Cost review required: true

## Guardrails
- Do not restart the whole app.
- Treat transformation as the product and people as the purpose.
- Preserve the app's specific purpose; apps share philosophy but do not share purpose.
- Do not import unrelated app goals, audiences, data, or workflows.
- Preserve the existing charter and current version history.
- Create or update the build completion plan before implementation, preview, review, release, or monitoring work advances.
- Do not continue model-heavy improvement work when cost governance says to pause or request owner approval.
- Do not claim preview success without route-specific preview verification.
- Route broad rebuilds into a separate App Build Packet or explicit v2 packet.
- Release through the improvement release gate and update monitoring.
